subcodes.title: Address to Outlook Tower society on 8 Jan. 1913
subcodes.first_line: I have pleasure in presenting myself to this gathering, so that I may explain to you certain of the principles of Bahá'u'lláh. Nearly sixty years ago
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @unity; oneness of humanity
